soal: What has a head and a tail but no body?
deskripsi: A coin has a head side and a tail side but no body.

soal: What gets sharper the more you use it?
deskripsi: Your brain improves the more you exercise it.

soal: What has cities, but no houses; mountains, but no trees; and water, but no fish?
deskripsi: A map shows all these things but contains none of them.

soal: What can you catch but not throw?
deskripsi: You can catch a cold but you cannot throw one.

soal: What travels around the world while staying in a corner?
deskripsi: A postage stamp sits in the corner of an envelope but travels the world.

soal: What gets wetter the more it dries?
deskripsi: A towel absorbs more water the more it dries things.

soal: I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body but I come alive with the wind. What am I?
deskripsi: An echo repeats sound without having a mouth or ears.

soal: The more you take, the more you leave behind. What am I?
deskripsi: Every step you take leaves a footprint behind.

soal: What has a neck but no head?
deskripsi: A bottle has a neck at the top but no head.

soal: What is always in front of you but can never be seen?
deskripsi: The future is always ahead but invisible.

soal: What goes up but never comes down?
deskripsi: Your age only increases — it never decreases.

soal: What can be broken without being touched?
deskripsi: A promise can be broken with just words or inaction.

soal: What has hands but cannot clap?
deskripsi: A clock has hands that move but cannot clap.

soal: What has teeth but cannot bite?
deskripsi: A comb has teeth but uses them to untangle hair, not bite.

soal: What is full of holes but still holds water?
deskripsi: A sponge is full of holes but absorbs and holds water.

soal: I have lakes with no water, mountains with no stone, and cities with no buildings. What am I?
deskripsi: A map represents all these things symbolically.

soal: What is so fragile that saying its name breaks it?
deskripsi: As soon as you say 'silence', you break it.

soal: What word is always spelled incorrectly?
deskripsi: The word 'incorrectly' is always spelled i-n-c-o-r-r-e-c-t-l-y.

soal: If you drop me I will crack; but smile at me and I will smile back. What am I?
deskripsi: A mirror reflects your smile but cracks if dropped.

soal: What runs all around a house but never moves?
deskripsi: A fence surrounds a house but stays in place.

soal: I have a head and tail that will never meet. What am I?
deskripsi: The heads side and tails side of a coin can never face each other.

soal: What do you throw out when you want to use it, and take in when you don't want to use it?
deskripsi: You throw out the anchor to stop, bring it back to move.

soal: What has one eye but cannot see?
deskripsi: A needle has an eye (the hole for thread) but cannot see.

soal: What has words but never speaks?
deskripsi: A book contains many words but produces no sound on its own.

soal: What kind of room has no doors or windows?
deskripsi: A mush-ROOM has no doors or windows.

soal: What belongs to you but other people use it more than you do?
deskripsi: Others say your name more often than you say it yourself.

soal: What can run but never walks; has a mouth but never talks?
deskripsi: A river runs and has a mouth at the sea but never speaks.

soal: If you have me, you want to share me. If you share me, you no longer have me. What am I?
deskripsi: Once you share a secret, it is no longer a secret.

soal: What do you call a bear with no teeth?
deskripsi: A bear with no teeth is a gummy bear.

soal: Why don't scientists trust atoms?
deskripsi: Atoms 'make up' everything — both literally and as in lying.

soal: What do you call cheese that is not yours?
deskripsi: Not-your cheese sounds like 'nacho cheese'.

soal: I am light as a feather yet the strongest person cannot hold me for more than a few minutes. What am I?
deskripsi: You cannot hold your breath for very long no matter how strong you are.

soal: What word becomes shorter when you add two letters to it?
deskripsi: Add 'er' to 'short' and you get 'shorter'.

soal: What has a thumb and four fingers but is not a hand?
deskripsi: A glove has five finger slots but is not a living hand.

soal: What three letters turn a girl into a woman?
deskripsi: Age turns a girl into a woman over time.
